ddls:
CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the event */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date and time of the event */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date and time of the event */,
  "reminder_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the reminder */,
  "html_link" TEXT /* HTML link to the event */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "frequency_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the frequency type of the event */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the event is held */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the event */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the event was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the event was last updated */,
  "event_status" TEXT /* Status of the event (e.g., Draft, Scheduled, In Progress, Completed) */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of the event (e.g., Meeting, Conference, Workshop) */,
  "event_priority" TEXT /* Priority of the event (e.g., Low, Medium, High) */,
  "event_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the event in minutes */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_frequency_id FOREIGN KEY ("frequency_id") REFERENCES frequencies ("frequency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "frequencies" (
  "frequency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each frequency type */,
  "frequency_name" TEXT /* Name of the frequency type (e.g., Daily, Weekly, Monthly) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the frequency type */,
  "frequency_interval" INTEGER /* Interval of the frequency (e.g., every 2 weeks, every 3 months) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("frequency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the location */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the location */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "availability_status" TEXT /* Availability status of the location (e.g., Available, Unavailable, Maintenance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user's role */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user's department */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user was last updated */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* Profile picture of the user */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Bio of the user */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  "notification_preferences" TEXT /* Notification preferences of the user (e.g., email, SMS, in-app notifications) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Admin, User, Guest) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "role_permissions" TEXT /* Permissions of the role (e.g., create events, manage users, view reports) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department manager */,
  "parent_department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_attendees" (
  "attendance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attendance record */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "attendance_status" TEXT /* Attendance status (e.g., Registered, Attended, Not Attended) */,
  "registered_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user registered for the event */,
  "attended_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user attended the event */,
  "check_in_time" TEXT /* Date and time when the user checked in */,
  "check_out_time" TEXT /* Date and time when the user checked out */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attendance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_attendees_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_attendees_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the file in MB */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., PDF, DOCX, PPTX) */,
  "uploaded_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the file */,
  "uploaded_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the file was uploaded */,
  "file_category" TEXT /* Category of the file (e.g., presentation, document, image) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_files_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_files_uploaded_by FOREIGN KEY ("uploaded_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event the tag belongs to */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag (e.g., Conference, Workshop) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  "tag_category" TEXT /* Category of the tag (e.g., event type, topic, industry) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_tags_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event the comment belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the comment was made */,
  "reply_to_comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the comment being replied to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_comments_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event the rating belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who rated the event */,
  "rating_score" INTEGER /* Rating score (1-5) */,
  "rating_text" TEXT /* Text of the rating */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the rating was made */,
  "rating_category" TEXT /* Category of the rating (e.g., overall, content, organization) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_ratings_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_invitations" (
  "invitation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each invitation */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event the invitation is for */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user being invited */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the invitation (e.g., Sent, Accepted, Declined) */,
  "sent_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the invitation was sent */,
  "response" TEXT /* Response to the invitation (e.g., accepted, declined, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("invitation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_invitations_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_invitations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_reminders" (
  "reminder_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reminder */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event the reminder belongs to */,
  "reminder_time" TEXT /* Date and time of the reminder */,
  "reminder_type" TEXT /* Type of the reminder (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  "reminder_status" TEXT /* Status of the reminder (e.g., sent, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reminder_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_reminders_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event the notification is for */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user being notified */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of the notification (e.g., event created, event updated, event reminder) */,
  "notification_status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., sent, pending) */,
  "sent_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the notification was sent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_notifications_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_event_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each preference */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "favorite" INTEGER /* Whether the event is a favorite */,
  "reminders" INTEGER /* Whether the user wants reminders for the event */,
  "notifications" INTEGER /* Whether the user wants notifications for the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_event_preferences_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_event_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
